verses.2: So I have seen you in the sanctuary,
verses.3: Because your loving kindness is better than life,
verses.4: So I will bless you while I live.
verses.5: My soul shall be satisfied as with the richest food.
verses.6: when I remember you on my bed,
verses.7: For you have been my help.
verses.8: My soul stays close to you.
verses.9: But those who seek my soul to destroy it
verses.10: They shall be given over to the power of the sword.
verses.11: But the king shall rejoice in God.
